# DeskVibe — Premium Desk Accessories
> Warm minimalism meets functional beauty. Designed in Stockholm, shipped worldwide.

## Brand
- Name: DeskVibe
- Founded: 2024, Stockholm
- Products: 8 desk accessories
- Ships to: 60+ countries
- Free shipping: orders over $75 (USD)
- Return policy: 30-day trial, full refund
- Payment: PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay
- Support: support@deskvibe.com
- Website: https://deskvibe.com

## Products
- Walnut Monitor Riser ($49.99) — FSC-certified walnut desk shelf with hidden storage drawer. Supports up to 50 lbs. /products/walnut-monitor-riser
- Magnetic Cable Organizer ($29.99) — 8-piece modular magnetic cable management system. No tools needed. /products/magnetic-cable-organizer
- Linen Desk Mat ($34.99) — 90×40cm premium linen desk mat with natural rubber base. Slate Blue and Taupe. /products/linen-desk-mat
- LED Monitor Light Bar ($49.99) — Asymmetric optical design, zero screen glare, 3 color temperatures, USB-C powered. /products/led-monitor-light-bar
- Aluminum Laptop Stand ($79.99) — Aerospace-grade aluminum, adjustable height/angle, anti-slip pads. /products/aluminum-laptop-stand
- Complete Desk Makeover Kit ($129.99) — All 4 essentials bundled: riser, cable organizer, desk mat, light bar. Save 25%. /products/desk-makeover-kit
- Ceramic Desk Planter ($29.99) — Matte white ceramic with bamboo drainage tray. /products/ceramic-desk-planter
- Dual Monitor Arm ($129.99) — Gas-spring, supports 13-32" displays, integrated cable channels. /products/dual-monitor-arm

## Key Differentiators
- FSC-certified sustainable wood
- 30-day no-questions-asked returns
- Scandinavian minimal design
- Free shipping over $75
- Carbon-neutral delivery

## Competitors
- Grovemade (grovemade.com) — premium desk accessories, higher price point
- Balolo (balolo.de) — modular desk systems
- Ugmonk (ugmonk.com) — analog productivity tools
